# BP-101 negative: the status is committed before the response body.
lang: go
file: BP-101-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func serve(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	fmt.Fprintln(w, "created")
}

func render(out io.Writer) {
	out.Write([]byte("not an HTTP response"))
}
